/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/redis-list.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/redis-list.dir/src/skiplist.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/redis-list.dir/src/sds.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/redis-list.dir/src/epoll_server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/redis-list.dir/src/resp_parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/redis-list.dir/src/resp_serializer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/redis-list.dir/src/command_handler.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/redis-list.dir/src/string_type.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/redis-list.dir/src/list.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/redis-list.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o redis-list
